author: Samuel Vaillant
subject: feat(DOMMaps): expose withGoogleMaps HOC [PART-1] (algolia/react-instantsearch#2000)
body:
* feat(DOMMaps): use withGoogleMaps for CustomMarker [PART-2] (algolia/react-instantsearch#2001)

* feat(DOMMaps): use withGoogleMaps for Marker [PART-3] (algolia/react-instantsearch#2002)

* feat(DOMMaps): use withGoogleMaps for Redo [PART-4] (algolia/react-instantsearch#2003)

* feat(DOMMaps): use withGoogleMaps for Control [PART-5] (algolia/react-instantsearch#2004)

* feat(DOMMaps): drop usage of GOOGLE_MAPS_CONTEXT [PART-6] (algolia/react-instantsearch#2005)
